description: Remove tasks button, remove list or other type button, remove the non list functionality. Put completed under tools. Make sure board background settings is under settings but remove from header. Remove the word usage from header, keep the word usage inside the actual modal once you click. Place auto mode button under tools. Move plan to tools.  Move search to the far left. Remove tasks button on far left.
title: Remove non-list functionality and reorganize UI layout
